mapper.insert: INSERT INTO compile_task ( project_id, engine, status, log, result_pdf_path, created_at, completed_at ) VALUES ( #{documentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{compilerVersion, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{logContent, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{pdfPath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.select: SELECT task_id, project_id, status, NULL AS error_message, log, engine, result_pdf_path, created_at FROM compile_task WHERE project_id = #{documentId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT task_id, project_id, status, NULL AS error_message, log, engine, result_pdf_path, created_at FROM compile_task WHERE project_id = #{documentId, jdbcType=BIGINT} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
